title: US naval blockade on Strait of Hormuz in effect - TreasuryONE
snippet: The US naval blockade on all Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz has come into effect, building pressure on Tehran to agree to Trump peace deal. Dollar and oil prices have both softened after Trump stated Iran reached out to Washington.

title: Trump quote: Iranians called us, want deal on enriched uranium
snippet: Trump: The Iranians want to make a deal — they called us this morning. The dispute is about the nuclear issue. Either they give us the enriched uranium or we will take it ourselves. Iran will not have nuclear weapons.

title: Polymarket bet 40K vs ceasefire ending April 15-18, down 85 percent
snippet: A Polymarket wallet bet 40K USD that Trump will announce end of US-Iran ceasefire by April 15-18, now down 34K (down 85 percent). Bet against ceasefire = ceasefire holding.

title: BREAKING: US-Iran new round negotiations Thursday - Kobeissi Letter
snippet: BREAKING: New round of US-Iran negotiations may be held on Thursday per AP. President Trump said we have been called by the other side and they want to work a deal. 319K views, 4.9K likes.

title: Markets moving higher - Crypto up, Polymarket war ending 73 percent by April 30
snippet: Markets moving higher today. New US-Iran negotiations expected Thursday. Polymarket war ending by April 30 at 73 percent. Bitcoin climbed to 4-week high above 74K USD, ETH up 5 percent.

title: China threatens countermeasures over Trump tariffs on Iran aid
snippet: China vowed countermeasures after Trump threatened new tariffs on Chinese goods if Beijing provided military assistance to Iran during Middle East war.

title: US naval blockade Hormuz - oil dollar both soften
snippet: The US naval blockade on all Iranian ports in Strait of Hormuz has come into effect. Dollar and oil prices have both softened. Trump said Iran reached out to Washington.

title: Iran can blow internet cables in Persian Gulf - strategic leverage
snippet: Iran has strategic cards: internet cables in Persian Gulf and Red Sea. Iran already won the strategic war. Trump has to accept reality.
